title.en: ORGANIC ELECTRIC SOLID-STATE DEVICES

Organic devices specially adapted for rectifying, amplifying, oscillating or switching; Organic capacitors or resistors having potential barriers (integrated devices or assemblies of multiple devices H10K19/00)
Organic capacitors or resistors having potential barriers
Organic diodes
Organic transistors
Bistable switching devices

comprising field-effect transistors
comprising components having an active region that includes an inorganic semiconductor

Organic devices sensitive to infrared radiation, light, electromagnetic radiation of shorter wavelength or corpuscular radiation (integrated devices or assemblies of multiple devices H10K39/00, H10K65/00; electrolytic light-sensitive devices H01G9/20)
comprising heterojunctions between organic semiconductors and inorganic semiconductors
comprising organic-organic junctions, e.g. donor-acceptor junctions
comprising bulk heterojunctions, e.g. interpenetrating networks of donor and acceptor material domains
{comprising a metal-insulator-semiconductor [m-i-s] structure}
comprising a p-i-n structure, e.g. having a perovskite absorber between p-type and n-type charge transport layers
{comprising a metal-semiconductor-metal [m-s-m] structure}
Photovoltaic [PV] devices
in which radiation controls flow of current through the devices, e.g. photoresistors

Integrated devices, or assemblies of multiple devices, comprising at least one organic radiation-sensitive element covered by group H10K30/00
Organic photovoltaic [PV] modules; Arrays of single organic PV cells
Devices controlled by radiation

{Integrated devices comprising a common active layer}

Organic light-emitting devices (integrated devices or assemblies of multiple devices H10K59/00, H10K65/00; organic semiconductor lasers H01S5/36)
OLEDs or polymer light-emitting diodes [PLED]
Organic light-emitting transistors

Integrated devices, or assemblies of multiple devices, comprising at least one organic light-emitting element covered by group H10K50/00
OLED displays

OLEDs integrated with touch screens
OLEDs integrated with light modulating elements, e.g. with electrochromic elements, photochromic elements or liquid crystal elements
OLEDs integrated with inorganic light-sensitive elements, e.g. with inorganic solar cells or inorganic photodiodes

Integrated devices, or assemblies of multiple devices, comprising at least one organic light-emitting element and at least one organic radiation-sensitive element, e.g. organic opto-couplers (organic image sensors integrated with organic light-emitting devices H10K39/34; OLED displays integrated with photosensors H10K59/13)
